name: Lady Malygda
location: Lady Malygda in Arboretum District, Tel Var lockbox merchant

bonuses.stat: When you deal direct damage to a target within 12 meters, create a 5 meter area that after 1 second, quickly moves forward and then returns, dealing 811 Shock damage to enemies and applying Minor Enervation for 5 seconds, causing the target to deal 10% less Critical Damage. This effect can occur once every 15 seconds and scales off the higher of your Weapon or Spell Damage.
